name: Telekinesis
desc: Push a unit within your line of sight away from you 10 tiles.

name: Telekinesis2
desc: Push a unit within your line of sight away from you 10 tiles with Chain Knockback.

name: Suggestion
desc: Cause an enemy within your line of sight to attack another enemy if it can.

name: Suggestion2
desc: Cause enemies in a target area within your line of sight to each attack another enemy if they can.

name: MindControl
desc: Charm an enemy within your line of sight for the rest of the battle.

name: MindControl2
desc: Charm an enemy within your line of sight for the rest of the battle. That unit immediately takes an extra turn.

name: MegaGrav
desc: Damage and throw each unit near you to random tiles.

name: MegaGrav2
desc: Damage and throw each unit in a target area to random tiles.

name: Psyflutter
desc: Teleport exactly three tiles away.

name: PsyFlutter2
desc:
Teleport exactly three tiles away.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: GravityPull
desc: Pull units toward a tile within range 5.

name: MagnetPull2
desc: Pull units in a larger area toward a tile at infinite range.

name: Mindblast
desc: Push away each unit near you. This inflicts Madness and has a small chance to inflict Stun.

name: MindBlast2
desc: Push away each unit near a target area. This inflicts Madness and has a small chance to inflict Stun.

name: PsychicChoke
desc: Deal damage to and inflict Bruise on a unit within your line of sight.

name: PsychicChoke2
desc: Deal damage to and inflict Bruise on a unit within your line of sight. This damage counts as physical damage and scales with [img:str].

name: ShattertheSky
desc: Create floating glass shards on a tile within your line of sight.

name: SkyShatter2
desc: Create floating glass shards in an area within your line of sight.

name: Supernova
desc: Deal damage to and inflict Blind on every unit within your line of sight.

name: Supernova2
desc: Deal damage to and inflict Blind on every unit within your line of sight, excluding your allies.

name: ReadMind
desc: Replace your spells with the spells of an ally cat until the end of the turn.

name: ReadMind2
desc: Replace your spells with upgraded versions of the spells of an ally cat until the end of the turn.

name: AlterDNA
desc: Spend all your mana. Give a unit within your line of sight a random stat up for every 3 mana spent (rounded up). Give enemies random stat downs instead.

name: AlterDNA2
desc: Spend all your mana. Give a unit within your line of sight a random stat up for every 2 mana spent (rounded up). Give enemies random stat downs instead.

name: Flicker
desc: Teleport two tiles away. Displace any units you teleport into.

name: Flicker2
desc: Teleport two tiles away. Displace any units you teleport into and inflict them with Confusion 2 and Blind 2.

name: MindMeld
desc:
Give another unit an extra turn after this one.
This spell can't be cast during extra turns.

name: MindMeld2
desc:
Give another unit +10 mana and an extra turn after this one.
This spell can't be cast during extra turns.

name: Vacuum
desc: Teleport all enemies within an area as close to the center of that area as possible.

name: Vaccuum2
desc: Teleport all enemies within a large area as close to the center of that area as possible and inflict Confusion on those units.

name: GrowHead
desc: Gain +1 [img:int] and -1 [img:cha].

name: Ping
desc:
Deal 1 damage to any unit within your line of sight.
RELOAD: Spend mana

name: Ping2
desc:
Deal 1 damage to any unit within your line of sight.
RELOAD: Spend mana
Bonus Passive: +2 [img:int].

name: FlashForward
desc: Teleport to any tile. At the end of your turn, teleport back to your original tile and deal 10 damage to any unit you teleport into.

name: FlashForward2
desc:
Teleport to any tile. At the end of your turn, teleport back to your original tile and deal 10 damage to any unit you teleport into.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Flashback
desc: Teleport back.

name: Order
desc: Force a unit within your line of sight to move and attack one of its enemies.

name: Order2
desc: Give a unit within your line of sight All Stats Up and force it to move and attack one of its enemies.

name: TemporalShards
desc: Give a unit within your line of sight +3 temporary Bleed Thorns until the end of its turn.

name: TemporalShards
desc: Give a unit within your line of sight +3 temporary Bleed Thorns until the end of its turn. If its was an ally, the bleed thorns last for the rest of the battle.

name: RealityScramble
desc: Randomize the positions of all units. Enemies get Confused.

name: RealityScramble2
desc: Randomize the positions of all units. Enemies get Confused. Non-boss enemies have a 10% chance to be erased from existence.

name: Glare
desc: Inflict Madness on a unit in your line of sight.

name: Glare2
desc: Inflict Madness and Confusion on a unit in your line of sight.

name: BlindingFlash
desc: Inflict Blind 2 on each unit near you in your line of sight.

name: BlindingFlash2
desc: Inflict Blind 2 on each enemy within five tiles of you in your line of sight.

name: Snatch
desc: Collect any pickup within your line of sight.

name: Snatch2
desc:
Collect any pickup within your line of sight.
Gain +1 [img:lck].

name: FutureSight
desc: A unit within your line of sight backflips out of the way the next time they're targeted by an enemy.

name: FutureSight2
desc:
A unit within your line of sight backflips out of the way the next time they're targeted by an enemy.
 [s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: MassManaLeech
desc: Inflict Mana Leech 2 and Weakness 2 on all units within 3 tiles of you.

name: MassManaLeech2
desc: Inflict Mana Leech 2 and Weakness 2 on all units within 5 tiles of you.

name: BecomeEntropy
desc: Vaporize everything on a tile within your line of sight. Against a boss, this deals damage and inflicts Stun instead.

name: BecomeEntropy2
desc: Vaporize everything on a tile within your line of sight. Against a boss, this deals massive damage and inflicts Stun instead.

name: FastForward
desc: Every ally that hasn't taken their turn yet takes their turn right after yours. You go first next round.

name: FastForward2
desc: Every ally that hasn't taken their turn yet takes their turn right after yours. Those units get +4 temporary [img:spd]. You go first next round.

name: AncestralRecall
desc: Upgrade one of your spells at random for the rest of the battle.

name: AncestralRecall2
desc: Target yourself or a unit within your line of sight and upgrade one of their spells at random for the rest of the battle.

name: CumulativeBlast
desc: Deal damage to a unit in your line of sight, then increase this spell's damage by 1 for the rest of the battle.

name: CumulativeBlast2
desc:
Deal damage to a unit in your line of sight, then increase this spell's damage by 1 for the rest of the battle.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Hallucinate
desc: Spawn a friendly illusion of a random unit that fades away after one turn.

name: Hallucinate2
desc: Spawn a friendly illusion of a random unit that fades away after one turn. The illusion gets +4 [img:spd] and +2 Damage.

name: MassHysteria
desc: Every enemy in your line of sight takes an extra turn. They are charmed on that turn.

name: MassHysteria2
desc:
Every enemy in your line of sight takes an extra turn. They are charmed on that turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: ExtraTurn?
desc:
Take an extra turn. You're stunned and don't regenerate mana on that turn.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

name: ExtraTurnQuestion2
desc:
Take an extra turn. You have a 75% chance to be stunned and don't regenerate mana on that turn.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

name: Mindcrack
desc: Inflict Magic Weakness 2 on all units in your line of sight.

name: MindCrack2
desc: Inflict Magic Weakness 2 and Confusion 1 on all non-allied units in your line of sight.

name: Reset
desc:
Revive all bodies, fully heal all units, and clear all status effects.
[s:.7](This spell can be cast only once per battle.)[/s]

name: Reset2
desc:
Revive all bodies, fully heal all units, and clear all status effects.
Castable while you're downed. It costs 0 mana if you're downed.
[s:.7](This spell can be cast only once per battle.)[/s]

name: Mimic
desc: Target an allied cat within your line of sight. Cast one of their spells at random for free (or use their basic attack if theres no good spells).

name: Mimic2
desc:
Target an allied cat within your line of sight. Cast one of their spells at random for free (or use their basic attack if theres no good spells).
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: ChaosSwap
desc: Swap positions with a random unit.

name: ChaosSwap2
desc: Swap positions with a random unit. If that unit was an enemy, you inflict Confusion on it.

name: Asteroid
desc: Make an asteroid fall onto a tile within your line of sight. The asteroid deals damage and leaves a rock.

name: Asteroid2
desc: Make an asteroid fall onto a tile within your line of sight. The asteroid deals damage, bruises and leaves a boulder.

name: Stasis
desc: Inflict Freeze on a unit within your line of sight.

name: Stasis2
desc: Inflict Freeze 1, Blind 2, and Confusion 2 on a unit within your line of sight.

name: Pass
desc:
Give a unit within your line of sight an extra turn immediately, then end your turn. 
Castable only if you haven't taken any actions this turn.
[s:.7](This can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

name: Pass2
desc:
Give a unit within your line of sight an extra turn immediately, then end your turn.
Castable only if you haven't taken any actions this turn other than your movement action.
[s:.7](This can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

name: ThinkDeep
desc:
Restore all of your mana and fall asleep.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: ThinkDeep2
desc:
Restore all of your mana and fall asleep.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn. This spell costs 0 mana.)[/s]

name: Puppet
desc: Force an enemy within your line of sight to attack in the direction it's facing.

name: Puppet2
desc: Force a unit within your line of sight to attack in the direction it's facing.

name: LookAway
desc: Every unit within your line of sight turns away from you.

name: YouSeeNothing2
desc: Every unit within your line of sight turns away from you and is inflicted with Blind 1.

name: GravityBlast
desc: Deal 10 Knockback to adjacent units. If you cast this from full mana, the units take 10 damage on collision.

name: ForceBlast2
desc: Deal 10 Knockback to adjacent units. If you cast this from full mana, the units take 10 damage on collision and get stunned.

name: IncreaseGravity
desc: Inflict Slow 1 on a unit within your line of sight. If you cast this from full mana, instead inflict Immobilize 1 and deal 6 damage.

name: IncreaseGravity2
desc: Inflict Slow 1 on each unit in an area around a tile within your line of sight. If you cast this from full mana, instead inflict Immobilize 1 and deal 6 damage.

name: Manifest
desc: Teleport in a straight line into a unit within your line of sight. Deal damage and displace it.

name: Manifest2
desc: Teleport into a unit within your line of sight. Deal damage and displace it.

name: Flip
desc: Turn a unit within your line of sight 180 degrees. Inflict Confusion 1 on that unit.

name: Flip2
desc: Turn a unit within your line of sight 180 degrees. Inflict Confusion 2 and Magic Weakness 1 on that unit.

name: Withdraw
desc: Pull any unit within your line of sight to a tile adjacent to you.

name: Withdraw2
desc:
Pull any unit within your line of sight to a tile adjacent to you.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: GravityWave
desc: Deal damage with Knockback 4 and Chain Knockback in a cone.

name: ForceCone2
desc: Deal damage with Knockback 4, Chain Knockback and inflict Bruise 1 in a cone.

name: Inversion
desc: Swap positions with a unit in your line of sight.

name: Inversion2
desc:
Swap positions with a unit in your line of sight.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Echo
desc: Teleport to the last tile you targeted with an ability if it's empty.

name: Echo2
desc: Teleport to the last tile you targeted with an ability. Displace and damage any units on that tile.

name: Slipstream
desc: Dash up to three tiles in a straight line or diagonally. Leave floating glass shards on tiles you pass through.

name: Slipstream2
desc: Dash up to five tiles in a straight line or diagonally. Leave floating glass shards on tiles you pass through.
